items.title: DOJ struggles as White House presses on voter fraud
items.description: Efforts to prosecute noncitizen voters have been slowed by lack of evidence, officials say, while Trump aides push for a broader crackdown.

items.title: In rare move, Veterans Affairs pulls back on controversial disability rule
items.description: Veterans groups had warned that the change would have disadvantaged veterans who need medication.
